name: Aircraft Management Services Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to owners or lessees (under a lease longer than 31 days) of an aircraft who pay a management company for support services and flights on the owner's aircraft.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes payments made by aircraft owners for management services (maintenance, fueling, pilot hiring, etc.) from the 7.5% air transportation excise tax.
